title: Jungle Panorama
description: adds a new and beautiful menu panorama WITH SHADERS!
body:
A cool menu Panorama with Complementary unbound 5.3 and the seed 80562828 with qraftified v9 on 1.21.3 at the coords 48, -416 on the surface with a wonderful 2048x2048 resolution. 

Have fun using it :)

Althoung marked as incompatible by Minecraft in the resourcepack selection screen, it will work. Just ignore the warning message that appears after selecting the pack. 

**Can I use this in my modpack? **
Yes of course. No crediting required.
